zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注突破方向
zh.content:
ETH/USD现价2112.45，24小时微跌0.15%，整体维持高位窄幅整理。价格运行于20日均线2100.67上方，说明短期多头仍占据主动，但上涨动能暂未形成明显放量突破，市场进入方向选择阶段。

从技术指标看，SMA提供有效动态支撑，短线趋势偏多。MACD位于零轴上方且快线为1.93，显示多头动能仍在，但信号线缺失使趋势确认度略低；RSI暂无数据，需结合后续价格表现判断是否进入超买区。

关键位置方面，下方首要支撑位在2100附近，若失守则可能回踩2085区域；上方短期阻力位关注2116至2130区间，突破后有望打开进一步上行空间，目标可看向2150一线。

交易策略上，建议短线采取区间交易思路，依托2100支撑低吸，目标看向2130以上；若价格有效突破2116并放量，可顺势追多。若跌破2100，则需及时止损，防范短期调整风险扩大。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 2112.45, holding slightly above the 20-period moving average at 2100.67, which suggests short-term bullish stability despite muted price action. The narrow intraday range between 2111.69 and 2116.22 reflects consolidation rather than aggressive directional momentum. Price structure continues to favor buyers while ETH remains above the psychological 2100 region, although the modest 24-hour decline of 0.15% indicates hesitation from market participants ahead of a stronger catalyst.

The MACD reading at 1.93140 points to lingering bullish momentum, even though the signal line is unavailable for full crossover confirmation. Momentum remains constructive, but the lack of RSI data limits visibility into overbought or oversold conditions. Still, Ethereum maintaining position above its SMA(20) reinforces the idea that dip buyers are active at lower levels. If momentum strengthens, traders could see a gradual extension toward higher resistance zones rather than an immediate breakout surge.

Immediate support is forming around 2100, aligned with the moving average and recent price floor. A breakdown below this region could expose Ethereum to additional downside toward 2085 and potentially 2060 if selling pressure accelerates. On the upside, resistance is developing near 2120, followed by a stronger barrier around 2145. A decisive move above those levels would improve bullish sentiment and may attract renewed speculative buying interest from short-term momentum traders.

From a trading perspective, conservative participants may prefer waiting for confirmation above 2120 before entering long positions, targeting the 2145–2160 area. Aggressive traders could consider range-based strategies while price remains compressed between support and resistance. Risk management remains important given the low volatility environment and incomplete momentum readings. A sustained hold above 2100 keeps the near-term outlook cautiously positive, while failure to defend that level would shift sentiment back toward bearish control.
